payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards. No memories were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact. No entity resolution is needed.

details: Admin SQL execution was not authorized for this user context.
The DELETE FROM memory_cards command was not executed.
No durable memory was created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you want to delete a specific memory, use an authorized memory-deletion request identifying the memory to remove.
If you believe you should have admin access, authenticate through the proper admin channel before issuing administrative commands.
